text: Austrian Cabinet Declines Bid to Ban Communist-Front World Youth Festival
ocr_text: Austrian Cabinet Declines Bid to Ban Communist-Front World Youth Festival

text:
A concerted effort to persuade the Austrian Government to withdraw its permission for the Communist-front World Youth Festival to convene in Vienna next July apparently has failed.

The only remaining possibility of preventing the Vienna meeting is to maneuver the preparatory committee itself into withdrawing.
ocr_text: The only remaining possibility of preventing the Vienna meeting is to maneuver the preparatory committee itself into withdrawing.
